rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: GRANT AS TO CONSTRUCTIVE EVICTION CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE UNDER THE INSTANT CIRCUMSTANCES, 2-YEAR DELAY IS UNREASONABLE AS A MATTER OF LAW. DENY AS TO WRONGFUL EVICTION BECAUSE FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN. DENY AS TO DECLARATORY RELIEF BECAUSE FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN. (PB)
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE CANTANIA BEING CALIFORNIA ASSOCIATED INSURANCE BROKERS (CAIB) AGENT. (CW)

rulings.Rulings: GRANT CCP 437C(H) CONTINUANCE. MOTION CONTINUED TO 2-21-02. REVISED OPPOSITION DUE 2/13/02. REVISED REPLY DUE 2/19/02. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: THADDEUS DOYKA VS JOHN A LORD
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. LITIGATION PRIVILEGE DOES NOT APPLY TO STATEMENT OF DEFENDANT THAT PLAINTIFF THREW ROCK THROUGH WINDOW AND PLAINTIFF WAS MARRIED TO JULIA LORD. CLAIMS FOR ABUSE OF PROCESS AND TRESPASS STRIKEN BASED ON CONCESSION BY PLAINTIFF. (CW)
